texto: The skies are haunted by that which it were madness to know
autor: and strange abominations pass evermore between earth and moon and athwart the galaxies. Unnamable things have come to us in alien horror and will come again.
explicacao: Citação de and strange abominations pass evermore between earth and moon and athwart the galaxies. Unnamable things have come to us in alien horror and will come again. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The skies are haunted by that which it were madness to know” articula reflexao, clark-ashton-smith, skies em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
